template_params: Dr. Meera, aapke high-risk patients ke liye ek game-changer insight hai: 3-month fluoride recall cycles se recurrence rates significantly drop. Yeh sirf theory…
tick_action.body:
Dr. Meera, aapke high-risk patients ke liye ek game-changer insight hai: 3-month fluoride recall cycles se recurrence rates significantly drop. Yeh sirf theory nahi hai—clinical trials confirm better outcomes for high-risk adults.

Yeh aapke clinic ke retention aur treatment success dono ko boost karega. Why this matters? Aap un patients ko long-term oral health par educate karke unki loyalty aur AOV dono badha sakte hain. Ek simple, targeted message inhe action lene ke liye trigger karega.

Kya main aapke high-risk patients ke liye ek 2-line recall message draft kar doon?
tick_action.rationale: research_digest trigger mapped to category digest item with source-grounded specificity. | LLM Drafted (2.51s)

turn2.body:
Dr. Meera, perfect. Here's your draft:

"Hi [Patient], aapke last visit mein high-risk factors identified the. Ek short 3-month fluoride recall aapke liye crucial hai. Book now for priority slot."

Reply CONFIRM to proceed with checklist.
turn2.rationale: Detected explicit commitment; switched from qualification to action mode. | LLM Responded (1.84s)
